seo.title: Contreras Auto Repair LLC | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Contreras Auto Repair in Dallas, TX offers expert auto repair and maintenance. From brakes to engines, we keep your car running safely. Call (214) 392-1258.

hero.headline: Reliable Auto Repair You Can Count On
hero.subheadline: Honest, quality service for your car — from routine maintenance to major repairs.

featureSections.title: All Your Auto Needs, One Place
featureSections.body: From brake repairs to engine diagnostics, we handle it all. Our certified technicians use advanced tools to get you back on the road safely.
featureSections.cardBody: We use only high-quality parts and back our work with a solid warranty.

featureSections.title: No Surprises, Just Honest Work
featureSections.body: We explain every repair in simple terms and provide upfront pricing. You'll never face hidden fees or unnecessary upsells.
featureSections.cardBody: We're proud to serve the Dallas community with integrity and skill.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty-Backed Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: Your vehicle is protected with comprehensive warranties on parts and labor.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach
whyChooseUs.description: Your satisfaction is our priority — we listen, explain, and deliver.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Call us today or book your appointment online.

servicesPage.intro: At Contreras Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running at its best. From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our experienced technicians have you covered.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Expert brake inspections, pad replacements, and rotor resurfacing.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety feature. We provide thorough brake inspections and high-quality repairs using premium parts. Whether you need new pads, rotors, or a complete brake system overhaul, our technicians ensure your stopping power is reliable.
benefits: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Replace worn components with quality parts.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test your brakes to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, depending on driving habits.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squeaking, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to identify and fix engine issues.
services.longDescription: Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment quickly pinpoints engine problems, from check engine lights to performance issues. We provide accurate repairs that restore power, efficiency, and reliability.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money

process.title: Scan
process.description: Connect diagnostic tools to read error codes.

process.title: Analyze
process.description: Interpret data and inspect related components.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Fix the root cause with precision.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be a minor issue like a loose gas cap or something more serious. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: How long does engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour.

services.title: Oil Changes & Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and fluid checks to keep your engine healthy.
services.longDescription: Routine maintenance is key to vehicle longevity. We offer complete oil changes using quality oils and filters, plus multi-point inspections to catch small issues before they become big problems.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: Drain old oil and replace with fresh oil and filter.

process.title: Inspect
process.description: Check fluids, belts, hoses, and tire pressure.

process.title: Report
process.description: Provide a detailed report of your vehicle's condition.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles for most modern vehicles.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality conventional and synthetic oils to meet manufacturer specs.

services.title: AC & Electrical System Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin cool and your electronics working.
services.longDescription: From air conditioning recharges to complex electrical diagnostics, we handle all your vehicle's climate and electrical needs. Our technicians are skilled in modern automotive electronics.

process.title: Test
process.description: Check AC pressure and electrical circuits.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Replace or repair parts and recharge system.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Often due to low refrigerant or a compressor issue. We can diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: Can you fix a parasitic battery drain?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in electrical diagnostics to find and fix battery drains.

about.headline: Dallas's Reliable Auto Repair Team
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road.
story: Contreras Auto Repair LLC was founded with a simple mission: deliver trustworthy auto repair to the Dallas community. Our founder, a seasoned mechanic with over two decades of experience, saw a need for transparent service where customers are treated like family. We started small, but our commitment to quality and honesty quickly earned us a loyal following.

Today, we continue that tradition. Every repair is backed by our dedication to excellence, and every customer is greeted with respect. We invest in the latest tools and ongoing training to ensure your vehicle receives the best care possible.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what's right, not what's profitable.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and skilled workmanship.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: Clear communication and upfront pricing always.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Proudly serving Dallas with local, family-owned care.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your auto repair needs.
